subject: Vullaby, a small dark bird Pokemon with a skull-cap head decoration and a bone-piece protecting its rear
description: A small dark-feathered bird Pokemon is shown in a dynamic pose. It has a round body with stubby dark wings and a skull-cap or bone-fragment resting on its head. A rounded bone piece covers its rear like a diaper or shield. The background features bright geometric shapes and color streaks typical of Pokemon card art — rainbow-like speed-lines and color blocks. The creature's expression reads as scrappy and slightly indignant. The overall impression is of a small but feisty creature.
foreground: Small dark bird Pokemon with skull-cap and bone rear-cover
background: Colorful geometric speed-lines and color streaks
